title: Virtuoso sesame connector drops timezone information
key_bug_features: Virtuoso sesame connector drops timezone information
bug_feature_seed: SPARQL PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#> PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://localhost/edcat/testsearchgraph> { <http://lod2.tenforce.com/wp8/dataset/testdatasetforsearch> a dcat:Dataset ; dct:modified "2013-10-30T14:37:00+01:00"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#dateTime> . } };
SPARQL PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> SELECT ?date FROM <http://localhost/edcat/testsearchgraph> WHERE { <http://lod2.tenforce.com/wp8/dataset/testdatasetforsearch> dct:modified ?date };

SPARQL PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> SELECT (STR(?date) AS ?date_str) FROM <http://localhost/edcat/testsearchgraph> WHERE { <http://lod2.tenforce.com/wp8/dataset/testdatasetforsearch> dct:modified ?date };

SPARQL PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> SELECT (DATATYPE(?date) AS ?dt) FROM <http://localhost/edcat/testsearchgraph> WHERE { <http://lod2.tenforce.com/wp8/dataset/testdatasetforsearch> dct:modified ?date };

SPARQL PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> SELECT ?date WHERE { GRAPH <http://localhost/edcat/testsearchgraph> { <http://lod2.tenforce.com/wp8/dataset/testdatasetforsearch> dct:modified ?date } };

SPARQL PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> SELECT (YEAR(?date) AS ?y) (MONTH(?date) AS ?m) (DAY(?date) AS ?d) FROM <http://localhost/edcat/testsearchgraph> WHERE { <http://lod2.tenforce.com/wp8/dataset/testdatasetforsearch> dct:modified ?date };

SPARQL PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> SELECT (TZ(?date) AS ?tz) FROM <http://localhost/edcat/testsearchgraph> WHERE { <http://lod2.tenforce.com/wp8/dataset/testdatasetforsearch> dct:modified ?date };
SPARQL PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> SELECT ?date WHERE { <http://lod2.tenforce.com/wp8/dataset/testdatasetforsearch> dct:modified ?date FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?date), '+')) };
SPARQL PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> SELECT ?date WHERE { <http://lod2.tenforce.com/wp8/dataset/testdatasetforsearch> dct:modified ?date FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?date), 'Z')) };
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_dataset (id INT, modified TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_dataset (id, modified, description) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE '2013-10-30 14:37:00+01:00', 'Test dataset for timezone handling');
SELECT modified FROM test_dataset WHERE id = 1;
